# Berne Appliance Repair — Full Plain-Text Reference

Premium appliance repair company in South Florida.

## Identity

- Brand name: Berne Appliance Repair
- Legal entity: Berne Repair, Inc.
- DBAs: Berne Appliance Repair, Berne Repair
- Owner: Eugene Berne
- Founded: 2022 (premium division of the Berne family of companies, serving South Florida since 2015; 29,000+ jobs completed, 4.79★/871 reviews)
- Phone: (754) 345-4515
- Email: BerneRepair@gmail.com
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Hours: Monday-Sunday 7 AM - 9 PM Eastern (open 7 days)
- Service area: Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach counties, Florida, USA
- License: licensed and insured for Florida operation
- Warranty: 90-day labor & parts on every repair

## Pricing

- Service call: $59 flat (covers trip + diagnosis, applied to repair if customer approves)
- Typical part-replacement repair: $150 – $300
- Sealed-system or control board: $400 – $800
- Payment: Cash, all major credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Zelle

## FAQ

Q: How much does a service call cost?
A: $59 flat. Covers trip and diagnosis. If you go ahead with the repair, the $59 is applied to the total.

Q: Do you offer same-day appliance repair?
A: Yes. Call before noon and we can usually have a technician at your door the same day across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Berne Appliance Repair is fully licensed and insured to operate in Florida. We carry general liability insurance.

Q: Which brands do you service?
A: All major residential and commercial brands. Premium specialists for Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Miele, GE Monogram. Also Bosch, KitchenAid, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, GE, Maytag, Frigidaire, Electrolux, and more.

Q: What warranty do you offer?
A: 90-day warranty on labor and parts we install. If the same issue reappears within 90 days, we return at no charge.

Q: Do you repair commercial appliances?
A: Yes. We service restaurants, property management companies, and retail (including past work with Target, Publix, Petco).

Q: Will the technician have the part on the truck?
A: For common parts on common brands, yes. About 70% of jobs finish on the first visit. Parts that need ordering typically arrive in 1-3 business days.

Q: Do you do emergency / after-hours repair?
A: We are open 7 days, 7 AM - 9 PM. For genuine emergencies outside those hours, call (754) 345-4515 — dispatch will tell you if a tech can be on-call.

## Services

### Refrigerator Repair
Built-in, French door, side-by-side, top-freezer, bottom-freezer, column. Failures we handle: not cooling, freezer over-icing, water leaks, ice maker issues, loud compressor, door seal damage, control board failure. Sub-Zero, Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Miele, GE Monogram, Bosch, LG, Samsung, Whirlpool, GE, KitchenAid, Frigidaire, Maytag.

### Washer Repair
Front-load, top-load, stackable. Failures: won't drain, won't spin, won't fill, leaks, loud banging during spin, error codes, door lock won't release. All major brands.

### Dryer Repair
Gas and electric. Failures: runs but no heat, takes multiple cycles to dry, loud squeal, burning smell, won't tumble, error codes. Plus vent cleaning that solves long dry-cycle problems.

### Dishwasher Repair
Built-in, drawer, portable. Failures: won't drain, leaks, dishes stay dirty, won't start, loud grinding, soap dispenser stuck. Bosch, Miele, KitchenAid, Whirlpool, GE, Samsung, LG.

### Oven & Range Repair
Gas and electric ovens, ranges, cooktops. Bake/broil elements, igniters, control boards, door hinges, thermostats. Premium: Wolf, Viking, Thermador.

### Microwave Repair
Built-in, over-the-range, drawer. Magnetrons, control boards, door switches, turntable motors, fans.

### Ice Maker Repair
Built-in, stand-alone, drawer. Water inlet valves, ice molds, harvest assemblies, control boards. Sub-Zero, Scotsman, U-Line, Manitowoc, Hoshizaki.

### Wine Cooler Repair
Dual-zone, single-zone, built-in. Compressors, thermoelectric units, fans, control boards. Sub-Zero, Viking, Thermador, Wine Enthusiast, EuroCave, Marvel, U-Line.

### Garbage Disposal Repair
Jams, motor failure, leaks, drain hookups. InSinkErator, Waste King, Moen, KitchenAid, GE.

### Air Duct Cleaning
HVAC duct cleaning, dryer vent cleaning, air handler service. HEPA-filtered negative-pressure equipment.

### Range Hood Repair
Wall-mount, island, under-cabinet, downdraft. Blowers, LEDs, touch panels, dampers, duct cleaning. Wolf, Viking, Thermador, Vent-A-Hood, Zephyr, Broan, Best.

## Service Area Cities

Miami-Dade: Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Aventura, Sunny Isles Beach, Key Biscayne, Pinecrest, Palmetto Bay, Cutler Bay, South Miami, Kendall, Doral, Hialeah, Hialeah Gardens, Miami Lakes, Miami Shores, Miami Springs, North Miami, North Miami Beach, Bal Harbour, Bay Harbor Islands, Surfside, Homestead.

Broward: Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Hallandale Beach, Weston, Pembroke Pines, Miramar, Davie, Plantation, Sunrise, Cooper City, Coral Springs, Coconut Creek, Parkland, Pompano Beach, Deerfield Beach, Tamarac, Margate, Lauderhill, Lauderdale Lakes, Wilton Manors, Oakland Park, Dania Beach, Southwest Ranches.

Palm Beach: Boca Raton, Delray Beach, West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, Boynton Beach, Wellington, Royal Palm Beach, Greenacres, Lake Worth Beach, Lantana, North Palm Beach, Riviera Beach, Juno Beach, Highland Beach, Manalapan, Gulf Stream.

## Team

Owner: Eugene Berne (commercial accounts, restaurants, property management).
Senior technicians: Refat Bekirov (refrigeration/diagnostics), Akhmed Osmanov (commercial laundry), Andrei Lavrov (sealed system/refrigerant), Dzmitrii Kitou (laundry).

## Real customer reviews (Google)

- Alice Sherwood, 5/5, 2026-02-08: "Couldn't recommend Berne more highly! My technician came on time, proceeded with expertise, and went above and beyond to get 2 appliances fixed before Christmas Eve."
- Brian Bibbee, 5/5, 2026-01-04: "Berne is literally one call and it's done. They show up on time, communicate throughout the job, and always produce a great result!"
- Dr. Kevin Cai Zhen, 5/5, 2026-01-04: "From customer service to the installation process of dryer and washer was amazing and smooth. I recommend 100%."
- Bonnie S, 5/5, 2025-11-01: "We couldn't be happier. Dzmitry was able to exchange the part of our washing machine, the attention we got was amazing."
- Dana Nelson, 5/5, 2025-10-23: "Fairly priced and the tech worked hard to be sure my LG refrigerator was fixed. He spent the day on a Sunday and came back the next day. No further charge for the 2nd visit."
- Gregory Ramsey, 5/5, 2025-12-14: "Refat showed up on time. Very diligent, explained the steps, replaced the part quickly."

Aggregate rating: 4.9/5 across reviews on Google for the Berne DBA listings.

## Lead workflow

Customer calls (754) 345-4515 or submits the form on any page → dispatch finds a same-day slot or next morning → technician arrives, runs $59 diagnostic, quotes repair → customer says go → repair done, often first visit → 90-day warranty issued by email.
